THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOY, EDNA C. SAH, TERENCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1383 - 24TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, D'S TO VAC & DLVR ALL KEYS & GARAGE OPENER BY 5PM 8/7/98; D'S TO PAY $150 BY 7/3/98; D'S TO DISM ALL MATTERS BEFORE RENT BOARD; SEC DEP FORF; IF D'S DEFAULT, PLTF IS ENTITLED TO IMMED RESTIT OF PREMISES & AMENDED JDGMT; EVICTION STAYED SO LONG AS D'S COMPLY W/TERMS; SEE FILE FOR MORE TERMS.....
